text.title: Minimum Product Frameworks Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying minimum product frameworks end-to-end.

step.name: extract-signals
step.action: Use sonnet to extract market_density + buyer_type + differentiator from inputs.
step.decision-gate: If any signal cannot be extracted, defer DR until research closes the gap.

step.name: score-matrix
step.action: Run pick-framework.sh which scores all 9 frameworks 0-5 against the signals.
step.decision-gate: If top-2 frameworks tie within 0.5, expand decision-record with rationale for the tiebreak.

step.name: pick-framework
step.action: PM selects the top framework; if conflict with portfolio horizon, escalate.
step.decision-gate: If portfolio horizon forbids the top framework, pick top admissible and document.

step.name: write-proof-gate
step.decision-gate: If proof gate is qualitative, reject and re-author.

step.name: register-triggers-and-merge-dr
step.action: Author >=2 revisit triggers; merge DR into product-docs.
